item.title: Charging Alone to Silence the Enemy
item.description: A veteran account of courage and resolve in combat, reflecting on a lone charge and the cost of service.

media:content.media:title: Charging Alone to Silence the Enemy
media:content.media:description: A veteran account of courage and resolve in combat, reflecting on a lone charge and the cost of service.

item.title: First AC-130 Engagement in Afghanistan
item.description: A veteran recalls the first time an AC-130 engaged Taliban forces, offering firsthand perspective on military service and airpower in war.

media:content.media:title: First AC-130 Engagement in Afghanistan
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls the first time an AC-130 engaged Taliban forces, offering firsthand perspective on military service and airpower in war.

item.title: How German Forces Infiltrated U.S. Lines
item.description: A historical look at how German forces infiltrated U.S. lines, based on firsthand wartime experience and military memory.

media:content.media:title: How German Forces Infiltrated U.S. Lines
media:content.media:description: A historical look at how German forces infiltrated U.S. lines, based on firsthand wartime experience and military memory.

item.title: Jeffrey’s POW Survival in North Vietnam
item.description: Jeffrey recalls captivity in North Vietnam, a threatened execution, and the resilience that helped him survive. A powerful account of courage behind prison walls.

media:content.media:title: Jeffrey’s POW Survival in North Vietnam
media:content.media:description: Jeffrey recalls captivity in North Vietnam, a threatened execution, and the resilience that helped him survive. A powerful account of courage behind prison walls.

item.title: John Allen Thought It Was the End
item.description: John Allen reflects on a moment when he thought it was the end, sharing a firsthand wartime memory from his Army service.

media:content.media:title: John Allen Thought It Was the End
media:content.media:description: John Allen reflects on a moment when he thought it was the end, sharing a firsthand wartime memory from his Army service.

item.title: They Didn't Wait for the Army
item.description: A brief historical look at people who acted before the Army arrived, reflecting courage, initiative, and the realities of wartime service.

media:content.media:title: They Didn't Wait for the Army
media:content.media:description: A brief historical look at people who acted before the Army arrived, reflecting courage, initiative, and the realities of wartime service.

item.title: How Vietnam Vets Differed from WWII Vets
item.description: A look at how U.S. Vietnam veterans differed from WWII veterans, reflecting on service, experience, and the changing nature of war.

media:content.media:title: How Vietnam Vets Differed from WWII Vets
media:content.media:description: A look at how U.S. Vietnam veterans differed from WWII veterans, reflecting on service, experience, and the changing nature of war.

item.title: A D-Day Paratrooper's Jump to Freedom
item.description: A D-Day paratrooper’s jump and the path to freedom, told through a veteran’s wartime experience and historical reflection.

media:content.media:title: A D-Day Paratrooper's Jump to Freedom
media:content.media:description: A D-Day paratrooper’s jump and the path to freedom, told through a veteran’s wartime experience and historical reflection.

item.title: How Rules of Engagement Shaped Soldiers' Lives
item.description: A historical look at how rules of engagement affected soldiers' lives and decisions in service.

media:content.media:title: How Rules of Engagement Shaped Soldiers' Lives
media:content.media:description: A historical look at how rules of engagement affected soldiers' lives and decisions in service.

item.title: How Taliban IEDs Became More Advanced
item.description: A historical look at how Taliban IEDs evolved over time, and the challenges they posed to service members in the field.

media:content.media:title: How Taliban IEDs Became More Advanced
media:content.media:description: A historical look at how Taliban IEDs evolved over time, and the challenges they posed to service members in the field.

item.title: Douglas Dillard Joins the Army at 16
item.description: Douglas Dillard enlisted in the U.S. Army at age 16, determined to help the United States win World War II.

media:content.media:title: Douglas Dillard Joins the Army at 16
media:content.media:description: Douglas Dillard enlisted in the U.S. Army at age 16, determined to help the United States win World War II.

item.title: A .51-Caliber Gun and Its Impact
item.description: A veteran reflects on the force of a .51-caliber gun and the lasting impact of being hit, in a firsthand wartime account.

media:content.media:title: A .51-Caliber Gun and Its Impact
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on the force of a .51-caliber gun and the lasting impact of being hit, in a firsthand wartime account.

item.title: Charles Brooking and PT Boat Missions
item.description: Gunner’s Mate Second Class Charles Brooking and his PT boat crew carried out nighttime missions against Japanese vessels, disrupting supply lines and reinforcements.

media:content.media:title: Charles Brooking and PT Boat Missions
media:content.media:description: Gunner’s Mate Second Class Charles Brooking and his PT boat crew carried out nighttime missions against Japanese vessels, disrupting supply lines and reinforcements.
